description: Orange handbag with a cut out design on the front for aesthetic appeal, two short handles woven through metallic loops, one metallic brand badge hanging from one of the handles and the other fixed on the left bottom, a detachable tassel with synthetic leather circular trims and chain details for style, one main zippered compartment with two slots and an inner zipped pocket in between, an organiser sleeve on one side and a zipped pocket on the other, two metallic loops on each side and one long adjustable and detachable strap to sling over the shoulder, one external zipped pocket at the back
